architecture_fit.note: Single attention head + one hand-set gate, minimal delta from base_model.py; cleanly implements AND and solves the goal quantitatively.

baseline_comparison.note: Beats the task's linear baseline (+0.23) and contrasts three ablations (no-gate, no-cosnorm, pass_4 product gate) that visibly fail.

faithfulness.note: Purely synthetic hand-set circuit; honestly disclosed with within-mechanism ablations and a proposed model-level ablation, but no trained-model causal test.

operating_range.note: Holds flat (~0.996) across the full cos 0→1 superposition sweep; does not probe other axes (density, noise, d) or find a breaking point.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Entirely hand-set weights with a clear count-of-features rationale — strong evidence of mechanism understanding.

visual_judgement.note: Robustness curve (ours vs baseline vs 3 ablations) plus an S-separation scatter make the claim legible at a glance.

visualisation_rationale.note: README ties sharpness-vs-cosine axes, baseline/ablation overlays, and the separation panel directly to the goal's superposition question.

notes: A clever, honest hand-built circuit: thresholding the cosine-corrected combined magnitude reads feature count, so the AND boundary survives full superposition (cos=1) where pass_4's per-feature product gate collapses. Headline superposition_robustness = 1.0 with flat ~0.996 sharpness and +0.23 lift, backed by strong ablations and a clear two-panel visualisation. Capped below perfect only by the absence of a trained-model causal test (appropriately disclosed) and no exploration of axes beyond the cosine sweep.
